acceptedAnswer.text: Yes if work aggravated to total—rate fully[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possible if cumulative or last caused permanent limits, but prove work contribution.** Prior didn't stop work? Recent may suffice[4]. **Key factors:** Expert on combo vs. single event. **Practical guidance:** File for all, seek ISIF-like if ID, full rating. Utah handles series[1]. **Attorney essential.**
